title: Building an early warning system for LLM-aided biological threat creation
titleZh: 为LLM辅助的生物威胁创建建立预警系统
summary: We’re developing a blueprint for evaluating the risk that a large language model (LLM) could aid someone in creating a biological threat. In an evaluation involving both biology experts and students, we found that GPT-4 provides at most a mild uplift in biological threat creation accuracy. While this uplift is not larg
summaryZh: 我们正在制定一个蓝图，用于评估大型语言模型(LLM)可能帮助某人制造生物威胁的风险。在一项涉及生物学专家和学生的评估中，我们发现GPT-4最多只能略微提高生物威胁创建的准确性。虽然这种提升并不大
highlights: We’re developing a blueprint for evaluating the risk that a large language model (LLM) could aid someone in creating a biological threat.
In an evaluation involving both biology experts and students, we found that GPT-4 provides at most a mild uplift in biological threat creation accuracy.
highlightsZh: 我们正在制定一个蓝图，用于评估大型语言模型(LLM)可能帮助某人制造生物威胁的风险。在一项涉及生物学专家和学生的评估中，我们发现GPT-4最多只能略微提高生物威胁创建的准确性。虽然这种提升并不大

title: Democratic inputs to AI grant program: lessons learned and implementation plans
titleZh: 对人工智能资助计划的民主投入：经验教训和实施计划
summary: We funded 10 teams from around the world to design ideas and tools to collectively govern AI. We summarize the innovations, outline our learnings, and call for researchers and engineers to join us as we continue this work.
summaryZh: 我们资助了来自世界各地的10个团队，以设计共同管理人工智能的想法和工具。我们总结创新，概述我们的经验教训，并呼吁研究人员和工程师加入我们，继续这项工作。
highlights: We funded 10 teams from around the world to design ideas and tools to collectively govern AI.
We summarize the innovations, outline our learnings, and call for researchers and engineers to join us as we continue this work.
highlightsZh: 我们资助了来自世界各地的10个团队，以设计共同管理人工智能的想法和工具。我们总结创新，概述我们的经验教训，并呼吁研究人员和工程师加入我们，继续这项工作。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: How OpenAI is approaching 2024 worldwide elections
summary: We’re working to prevent abuse, provide transparency on AI-generated content, and improve access to accurate voting information.
summaryZh: 我们正在努力防止滥用，提高人工智能生成内容的透明度，并改善对准确投票信息的访问。
highlights: We’re working to prevent abuse, provide transparency on AI-generated content, and improve access to accurate voting information.
highlightsZh: 我们正在努力防止滥用，提高人工智能生成内容的透明度，并改善对准确投票信息的访问。

title: Introducing ChatGPT Team
summary: We’re launching a new ChatGPT plan for teams of all sizes, which provides a secure, collaborative workspace to get the most out of ChatGPT at work.
summaryZh: 我们正在为各种规模的团队推出新的ChatGPT计划，该计划提供安全、协作的工作空间，以便在工作中充分利用ChatGPT。

title: OpenAI and journalism
summary: We support journalism, partner with news organizations, and believe The New York Times lawsuit is without merit.
